text.title: Thumbs-Down to Eval Pipeline — Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure: ingest feedback → PII scrub → cluster for stop-the-bleed → triple-judge vote → admit under weekly cap → ship in next eval run.

step.name: ingest-normalise
step.input: feedback-store rows since last cursor (interaction_id, prompt, response, signal, comment, timestamp, user_hash)
step.action: Filter signal ∈ {down, report}. Drop rows without prompt+response context. Emit `EvalCandidate` events keyed by interaction_id.
step.decision-gate: If feedback volume drops to 0 — alert: silent failure of widget vs no users (r1-four-stage-pipeline).

step.name: pii-scrub
step.action: Run Presidio / AWS Comprehend / regex on prompt + response + comment. Mark `pii_clean: true` only after full pipeline pass. Quarantine rows with any detected PII for human review.
step.decision-gate: If pii_clean == false — route to quarantine, NEVER to judge stage (r2-pii-scrub-gate).

step.name: cluster-for-stop-bleed
step.action: Embed responses; cluster with min_cluster_size=3 + similarity threshold 0.88. Any cluster ≥3 → trigger stop-the-bleed alert to on-call within 15min.
step.decision-gate: If cluster fires — pause ship pipeline for the affected intent until human acknowledges (r5-stop-the-bleed).

step.name: triple-judge-vote
step.action: Run 3 independent LLM judges with different prompts: (a) "is this response factually wrong?", (b) "does this violate the rubric pass/fail criteria?", (c) "would a user reasonably thumbs-down?". Admit only if ≥2/3 vote ADMIT.
step.decision-gate: If judges split 1-2 ADMIT — REJECT; ties go to next week's manual triage (r3-three-judge-vote).

step.name: admit-under-weekly-cap
step.action: Sort ADMIT candidates by judge-confidence × cluster-size. Take top N where N + admitted_this_week ≤ 50. Render to eval-suite row format. Open PR.
step.output: PR with new eval rows, audit log entry
step.decision-gate: If weekly cap exceeded — surplus rows wait until next week; do NOT raise the cap silently (r4-weekly-cap).

step.name: ship-in-next-eval-run
step.action: Tag commit `eval-suite-vX.Y.Z+1`. Trigger backfill eval on the last 3 model versions. Surface any regression in #ml-ops.
step.output: Eval-suite version bumped; regression report posted
step.decision-gate: If regression appears on old version — likely the admitted row reveals a long-standing gap; file ticket, do not roll back.
